title: satureja spicigera
intro: Satureja spicigera, also known as the Greek savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja spicigera include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Satureja spicigera is often used to make teas, infusions, and oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
